personal_info.name: Harnish Jariwala
personal_info.summary: Cloud Infrastructure and Azure Architecture professional with 16+ years of experience leading enterprise infrastructure modernization, hybrid cloud transformation, operational resiliency, and Azure platform operations. Proven expertise delivering scalable cloud infrastructure, improving operational maturity, strengthening disaster recovery readiness, optimizing cloud costs, and supporting enterprise production environments.

bullets: Deployed Azure HA/DR assessments across enterprise compute, networking, monitoring, identity, and recovery environments.
Validated resiliency readiness using Azure Backup, Site Recovery, Availability Zones, and failover planning strategies.
Reviewed Azure Landing Zone governance, subscription alignment, operational readiness, and cloud maturity standards.
Maintained platform resiliency metrics impacting business continuity, SLA alignment, and stability across production environments.
Utilized infrastructure data to plan remediation initiatives, improving reliability and operational standards for platform teams.
Deployed enterprise infrastructure operations across development, staging, and production Azure workload environments.
Managed and mentored cloud engineering teams, improving operational consistency, quality, and delivery performance.
Utilized Azure Monitor and Grafana observability solutions, reducing mean-time-to-resolution by approximately 40%.
Provisioned incident response, escalation handling, and operational governance standards across Azure environments.
Maintained architecture readiness reviews, cloud optimization initiatives, and infrastructure stability through performance improvements.
Maintained secure Azure infrastructure environments supporting enterprise workload availability and operational stability.
Deployed Azure networking controls including subnet segmentation, routing, and access governance.
Provisioned Azure Backup policies and testing to support business continuity and recovery requirements.
Utilized compliance teams to align governance, firewall controls, and infrastructure security standards.
Maintained infrastructure documentation and runbooks improving support readiness and operational consistency.
Deployed Azure infrastructure support, monitoring, and operational optimization for enterprise customer environments.
Maintained hybrid migration hubs, subscription management, and resource optimization across complex cloud environments.
Managed technical enablement and standard operating procedure documentation for on-prem to cloud transition.
Provisioned cloud monitoring tools and performance tracking dashboards for mission-critical workloads.
Architected landing zone architectures and platform governance for massive-scale Azure deployments (2500+ VMs).
Orchestrated cloud migration strategies, ensuring zero-downtime transitions for complex business applications.
Enforced governance, policy enforcement, and RBAC standards across enterprise-grade global subscriptions.
Leveraged Azure Site Recovery and failover simulation to maintain 99.99% availability metrics.
Managed resource rightsizing and architectural optimization, delivering 20% cloud spend reduction.
Directed infrastructure modernization initiatives including physical-to-virtual and cloud migration phases.
Maintained healthcare-compliant storage and compute environments ensuring 24/7 diagnostic platform availability.
Provisioned automated backup workflows and DR verification protocols across hybrid environments.
Managed network infrastructure stability and security across decentralized clinical locations.
Maintained AD/DNS/DHCP services and Windows Server infrastructure for enterprise diagnostic operations.
Orchestrated technical logistics and hardware lifecycle management across multiple state regions.
Provisioned IT support and incident resolution for hundreds of distributed clinical endpoints.
Supported server deployments, Active Directory deployments, and enterprise endpoint security for B2B portal accounts.
Maintained virtualization clusters and hardware-level performance monitoring for client environments.
Delivered site-wide technical support and critical infrastructure maintenance under strict enterprise SLAs.
Managed technical hardware deployments and incident resolution cycles for large-scale operations.
